untranslatable_reason: Twin Bottom pattern detection requires identification of two distinct local minima at approximately equal levels and the highest high between them. This multi-bar pattern recognition cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and comparison operators. The confirmation price (highest high between bottoms) and the detection of exactly two bottoms at similar levels require pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot points as a proxy for support level confirmation and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the core Twin Bottom EADB pattern logic. A proper implementation would require: (1) local minimum detection across multiple bars, (2) comparison of two distinct local minima levels, (3) identification of the highest high between them, and (4) validation that no third bottom forms before breakout confirmation. These requirements exceed the scope of single-bar technical indicators.
